main_post.text:
🔍 GitHub Release Update: v0.1.12

Sunwood-ai-labs published a new release for their github-account-scanner detection test repository.

🎯 Key Points:
• AgentAGI explainer prompt delivery restored and verified
• Production verification confirms end-to-end pipeline
• Scanner detects release and triggers Discord notification
• Part of continuous integration testing for automated content pipeline

This is a dedicated test repository to ensure the github-account-scanner system reliably detects new releases and delivers explainer prompts correctly.

$ONIAGI
